approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

title: SW-011 — Add overview and resilient live views
goal: Expose project navigation, freshness, active jobs, provider health, publications and failures while remaining useful during Miro outage.

acceptance.assertion: Projects and views are discoverable through one registry-backed overview.
Every live fact exposes observed time, source and stale/error state.
Core diagnostics remain available when Miro is unavailable.
Declared live views can run in bounded fullscreen/display profiles.
